description: Browser-based app ecosystem and rule system for the Coffin Canyon game.

apps.description: Interactive browser applications such as Scenario Builder, Faction Builder, Canyon Map, Rules Explorer, and Turn Counter.

ui.description: Shared UI framework used by all apps including loader, reusable components, and shared styles.

data.description: Canonical structured data used by the system.

assets.description: Visual assets including terrain imagery and icons.

rules.description: Compatibility artifacts from older architecture including rules_base.json.

design_rules: Separate design from functionality wherever possible.
Reusable styles should live in ui/cc_ui.css.
Reusable UI components should live in ui/cc_components.js.
Apps should avoid embedding large CSS blocks in JavaScript.
